landing.title: KYK
landing.subtitle: Know Your Kid · Understand your child’s personality and parenting context
landing.intro_title: A simple way to better understand your child’s personality
landing.intro_desc: KYK helps you explore your child’s temperament and response patterns through a short set of questions. Once your result is saved, the AI Coach can provide more relevant and personalized guidance based on your child’s unique personality.
landing.point_1: • It only takes about 1–2 minutes to complete.
landing.point_2: • You can begin without logging in, but sign-in may be required to save your result.
landing.point_3: • You can retake KYK anytime as your child grows and changes.

step1.title: KYK
step1.question: Q1. Please select 5 adjectives that best describe your child.

step3.title: KYK
step3.modal_body: To save and view your results, please log in with Google. Click OK to proceed to the account selection screen.

questions.q2: My child makes new friends easily.
questions.q3: My child is perfectly happy playing quietly by themselves.
questions.q4: My child speaks comfortably, even with people they've just met.
questions.q5: My child is curious about the "why" or the background behind a story.
questions.q6: My child likes to draw things realistically (exactly as they look).
questions.q7: During playtime, my child tends to invent imaginary worlds or their own rules.
questions.q8: My child shows empathy and tries to comfort a crying friend.
questions.q9: My child tries to explain situations logically.
questions.q10: My child cares deeply about what is right and wrong.
questions.q11: My child tends to plan ahead before starting a task.
questions.q12: My child gets flustered or upset when plans change suddenly.
questions.q13: My child prefers to do the fun things first and puts off tasks they dislike.

gate.title: KYK
gate.modal_desc: You need to log in to save your KYK results and allow the AI Coach to personalize responses for your child.

result.title: KYK
result.subtitle: Our Child’s Primary Personality
result.login_required: You need to log in to view the results.
result.unable_to_display: Unable to display personality test result.
result.keyword_title: Keywords related to this personality profile

login_modal.title: Google login required to view results
login_modal.desc: Save your KYK results to your account and the AI Coach will reflect this personality trait in future sessions.

computed.summary_fish: A thinker type who enjoys deep exploration and analysis.
computed.summary_intj:
A deep thinker who values self-satisfaction over external validation.
Independently advances toward goals. Strong in logic and analysis, excelling at finding efficient methods. However, perfectionism can pressure them.
They will show strengths in science, strategy games, and research projects.
Increasing flexibility in the process of achieving goals and expanding collaborative experiences with others will broaden their perspective.
computed.summary_intp:
Full of curiosity, they explore the world in their own unique way.
Enjoys deep exploration and analysis. Immerses in understanding new concepts and principles. However, they can often stay in thoughts rather than execution.
They can achieve excellent results in knowledge exploration fields like science, math, programming, and invention.
Translating thoughts into small experiments and projects will increase their sense of accomplishment.
computed.summary_infj:
Highly imaginative and deeply sensitive to the emotions of others.
Has insight into people's hearts and the meaning of situations. However, they can easily tire without enough alone time.
They are highly likely to show sincerity in writing, counseling, and artistic activities.
They should be encouraged to steadily continue activities that give them inspiration while keeping their own pace.
computed.summary_infp:
Emotionally rich, they quietly and deeply observe their surroundings.
Rich in imagination and creativity, showing sincerity in what they believe. However, they can suffer stress from practical matters.
They are highly likely to show deep immersion and inspiration in writing, arts, and creative activities.
Teaching them how to balance ideals and reality will let them achieve their dreams more healthily.
computed.summary_istj:
Highly responsible and strictly follows rules and order.
Values stability and order. Has the power to plan and proceed step by step. Completes assigned tasks to the end, earning the trust of those around them. However, they can find changes burdensome.
They will show strengths in learning, sports with rules, and long-term projects. Consistent effort is highly likely to lead to results.
Practicing taking small challenges in new environments while utilizing their stable strengths can give them broader possibilities.
computed.summary_istp:
Quiet on the outside, but highly logical and analytical on the inside.
Adapts quickly to situations. Has excellent dexterity and observation skills, and likes learning by actually doing things. However, they may have low interest in long-term plans.
They will stand out in 'body-learning activities' like crafting, experiments, and sports. Calmly finds solutions in crisis situations.
While utilizing their spontaneous strengths, cultivating the habit of taking on tasks with a long breath will broaden their scope of growth.
computed.summary_isfj:
A deeply considerate child who shows warmth through actions rather than words.
Likes to help people around them. Carefully takes care of others and quietly finishes assigned tasks to the end. However, putting others before their own emotions can exhaust them.
They will become a trusted member in caregiving, volunteering, and group assignments.
Guiding them to have time and hobbies for themselves will allow them to maintain their energy and help others for a long time.
computed.summary_isfp:
Highly perceptive and quietly expresses their own unique sense of beauty.
Immerses in sensory activities like nature, art, and music. However, strongly asserting their opinions can be burdensome.
They are highly likely to show talent in creative fields like art, music, design, and writing.
Learning various ways of self-expression will allow them to share their heart with more people.
computed.summary_entj:
Highly driven to set their own goals and achieve them.
Efficiently plans and drives things forward. Shows no hesitation in finding center and making decisions in any situation. Highly competitive and enthusiastic about taking on difficult challenges. However, sometimes they can become impatient, unable to wait for the pace of those around them.
They are highly likely to achieve results in group activities or projects requiring leadership. Will grow significantly in goal-oriented environments like sports, debates, or startup camps.
Adding 'listening to others' opinions' and 'pacing' to their fast driving force will earn them greater trust. Experiencing failure and developing the flexibility to cope will mature their leadership.
computed.summary_entp:
Overflowing with ideas, they have to try things out themselves to be satisfied.
Highly curious and looks at problems from various perspectives. Excels in debates and presentations due to their eloquence and quick thinking. However, preferring spontaneity over planning can result in weak follow-through.
They are highly likely to be active in invention contests, creativity camps, and debate competitions. Will entertain friends by creating new games or modifying rules.
To realize their abundant ideas, it is important to cultivate the 'habit of finishing what they start'. Guiding them to balance spontaneity and planning will increase their sense of accomplishment.
computed.summary_enfj:
Caring and always wants everyone to get along and be happy.
Finds meaning in relationships. Good at discovering others' strengths and encouraging them. Has a warm heart, approaching and helping friends in need first. However, they can take on too much of others' problems.
They will stand out in volunteer activities, leadership camps, and cooperative projects. Highly likely to act as a 'sturdy pillar' in friendships.
They must be taught how to take care of their own emotions as much as they help others. Maintaining healthy relationships while keeping 'the boundaries of my share' will make them a good leader for a long time.
computed.summary_enfp:
Warm-hearted and bursting with curiosity for new things.
Creative and has rich imagination. Finds joyful ideas and adventures, making their surroundings lively. Not afraid of change and challenges. However, it can be difficult to focus on one thing for a long time.
They are highly likely to lead new attempts in various activities and become a mood maker in clubs or gatherings.
Cultivating the habit of completing goals to the end while maintaining interest will greatly expand their potential. Practice in connecting ideas with execution plans is needed.
computed.summary_estj:
A natural leader who gets things done efficiently.
They strictly follow rules and have the power to complete their assigned tasks to the end. They shine brighter in teams than alone, handling tasks accurately and quickly. However, they may sometimes push their ideas too strongly.
They are highly likely to naturally lead play with friends or become leaders in presentations or role-playing. They can grow into a trusted child by keeping rules and promises.
Practicing listening to various opinions and having the courage to admit when they're wrong will make them an even better leader. Teaching them how to enjoy even in free play without rules will improve their balance.
computed.summary_estp:
Full of energy and loves to learn hands-on.
Highly curious about new things and likes to learn by experiencing them physically. They have quick situational judgment and excellent immediate action, acting as a mood maker among friends.
Not afraid of risks, they often try new games, but sometimes action precedes thought.
They are highly likely to stand out in activities that require immediate reactions like sports, exploration, performances, and games. Their momentary leadership in guiding friends shines, and their bold personality can make them stand out in presentations or on stage.
Allowing them to have new experiences while teaching safety rules and risk prediction methods together will enable more balanced growth. Cultivating the habit of making a brief plan before an activity will develop both their action and judgment skills.
computed.summary_esfj:
Sweet and sociable; they are great at reading the room.
Finds great joy in helping those around them. They are good at sensing changes in others' moods and creating a good atmosphere. Active in organizing gatherings or play and taking care of friends. However, sometimes they can exhaust themselves by being too conscious of others' expectations.
They are highly likely to become a 'central figure' in friendships, displaying excellent coordination skills in cooperative activities, gathering preparation, and joint projects. They can shine on stages where teamwork is important like presentations, choir, or plays.
While utilizing their ability to help others, it is good to cultivate the habit of securing time and space for themselves. Teaching them the fact that 'it is difficult to satisfy everyone' will help them maintain healthier relationships.
computed.summary_esfp:
Energetic, positive, and the life of the party who makes everyone smile.
Not afraid of new people or new experiences. They are skilled at creating momentary joy and laughter, making people around them feel good. They adapt quickly to new games or activities and participate actively. However, preferring spontaneous choices over planning can sometimes result in disappointing outcomes due to lack of preparation.
They are highly likely to receive attention and stand at the center in events like festivals, performances, sports days, and camps. They transmit positive energy to their peers and often take the role of leading the atmosphere.
While utilizing their tendency to pursue joy, cultivating the habit of preparation and concluding in important tasks will enable more stable growth. Practice in balancing spontaneity and planning is needed.
